fields.label: Eyebrow
fields.name: info_tabs_eyebrow
fields.instructions: Small overline above the heading, e.g. "Practical Nursing".

fields.label: Tabs
fields.name: info_tabs_tabs
fields.instructions: Each tab shows a label in the vertical nav and reveals its rich-text panel. 3–5 tabs work best.

sub_fields.label: Alert Banner (optional)
sub_fields.name: info_tabs_tabs_alert
sub_fields.instructions: Optional highlighted callout shown at the top of this panel, e.g. "Apply by August 1. The fall cohort fills quickly." Leave blank to omit. Basic inline HTML (strong/em/a) allowed.

sub_fields.label: Alert Icon
sub_fields.name: info_tabs_tabs_alert_icon
sub_fields.instructions: Icon shown beside the alert banner. Defaults to alert-01.

sub_fields.label: Panel Content
sub_fields.name: info_tabs_tabs_panel
sub_fields.instructions: Rich content for this tab. Headings, paragraphs, lists and definition lists are styled automatically.
